name: Axis Bank Reserve Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Axis Bank Reserve Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of Rs 35 lakh in the preceding year
additionalBenefits: 15,000 EDGE REWARD Points on card activation
15 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 spent on eligible domestic spends
ITC Culinaire, Accor Plus and Club Marriott hotel memberships, subject to product terms
50 complimentary golf rounds per year, subject to product terms
Unlimited domestic and international lounge access, subject to applicable programme terms
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per month
Purchase protection up to Rs 2 lakh
Credit shield cover up to Rs 5 lakh
Travel inconvenience cover up to USD 500 for baggage and personal document loss or delay

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria for ultra-premium credit cards
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria for ultra-premium credit cards
